subcodes.title: Seal of Baha’u’llah #15
subcodes.first_line: The lights of the countenance have shown forth from the dawning-place of eternity.  No god is there but Him.  Verily, He is the glorious, the most glorious.
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اشرقت انوار الوجه عن مشرق البقاء لا اله الا هو البهی الابهی
